sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Täglich grüßt das Murmeltier.');
SELECT id, substringUTF8(text, 10) AS substring FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET text = substringUTF8(text, 5, 3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, substringUTF8(text, -10, 5) AS substring_end FROM test_strings;
